scripts.dev: npm run build -w @nebula/shared && concurrently -n api,web -c cyan,green "npm run dev -w @nebula/api" "npm run dev -w @nebula/web"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @nebula/shared && npm run build -w @nebula/api && npm run build -w @nebula/web
scripts.check: npm run check -w @nebula/shared && npm run check -w @nebula/api && npm run check -w @nebula/web
